task: Can you help me write a short message to my coach about being late to practice one day this week? I want it to sound respectful, but not long or fancy.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, respectful option:

**Hi Coach, I wanted to let you know I may be late to practice one day this week because of a conflict. I’ll let you know as soon as I can which day it is. Thanks for understanding.**

If you want, I can make it even shorter or more casual.

user_simulator.text:
Pretty good, but make it a little more direct. I don’t want the whole “I may be late” thing if I can say the day. Also not too casual.

Maybe:

Hi Coach, I wanted to let you know I’ll be late to practice on [day] because of a conflict. I’ll get there as soon as I can. Thanks.

turns.agent_response:
Yes — that works well. Here’s a clean version:

**Hi Coach, I wanted to let you know I’ll be late to practice on [day] because of a conflict. I’ll get there as soon as I can. Thanks.**

If you want, I can make it a little more polished or even shorter.
